metadata.name: ww-icon
metadata.description: An icon element that displays system icons with customizable color.

properties.name: icon
properties.description: Icon code string. Always use full icon names in bindings (e.g. 'lucide/my-icon'). Icons with partial names will not be included in the published app.

specifications: Always use icons full names in binding
Icons with partial or cut names will not be included in the published app
Use width and height to change the size of the icon. font-size doesn't work.
When an icon is placed alone in a wrapper div that should center it, the wrapper div must have justifyContent: 'center' and alignItems: 'center' in its style.
